site.title: International Accessibility Task Force (Ekibiina Ekikola ku Kufuna Obuyambi mu Nsi Yonna)
site.tagline: Okuviira ddala ku bwetaavu bw'okubeerawo okutuuka ku biwandiiko bya gavumenti
nav.label: Ekisooka
meta.home.description: IATF ekyusa obwetaavu obw'amazima obw'okutuukirikika mu bifo eby'okuterekamu ebiwandiiko eby'obwannannyini.
meta.projects.description: Tunuulira pulojekiti z'abantu bonna ezifulumiziddwa okuyita mu IATF.
meta.propose.description: Saba pulojekiti ey'okutuukirikika okuva ku IATF okuyita ku web, email, oba Discord.
meta.governance.description: Soma engeri IATF gy'ekkiriza pulojekiti, ekuuma ebiwandiiko, era n'ekuumira emirimu mu lwatu.
meta.join.description: Engeri gy'oyinza okwenyigira mu IATF: okuwaayo code, okuvvuunula, okugezesa, oba okukuuma pulojekiti.
meta.accessibility.description: Engeri IATF gy'egenderera okukuuma omukutu guno nga gusobola okufunibwa era n'engeri y'okutegeeza ku kizibu eky'okufunibwa.
meta.transparency.description: Ebiwandiiko bya IATF ebikubibwa mu lujjudde: okusalawo, pulojekiti, n'ebintu ebippya ebikuumibwa nga bikkirizibwa.
registry.empty.title: Tewakyafulumizibwa pulojekiti
registry.empty.body: IATF eteekateeka pulojekiti yaayo esooka ey'olukale.
proposal.form.title: Tuma okusaba
proposal.form.body: Jjuza foomu eno wammanga osobole okusindika okusaba eri IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript yeetaagisa okukozesa webform eno. Bw'eba nga teriiko, kozesa email oba Discord mu kifo kyayo.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Okuweereza obutereevu tekutegekeddwa mu mbeera eno. Enkola eno ejja kuggulawo kkalenda yo eya email mu kifo kyayo.
proposal.form.ready: Okuweereza okw'obukuumi kutegekeddwa. Bw'osindika okusaba, IATF ejja kutondawo ekiwandiiko eky'okufuna.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Nkusaba omaliriza okukebera okw'okukuuma spam nga tonnasindika.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Obukuumi bwa Spam buweddewo. Nkusaba omale okukebera nate nga tonnasindika.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Obukuumi bwa Spam tebusobola kukakasibwa mu kiseera kino. Nkusaba ogezeeko omulundi omulala.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Obukuumi bwa Spam buweddewo. Nkwegayiridde gezaako okukebera omulundi omulala.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Nkwegayiridde jjuza ebifo ebyetaagisa nga tonnaba kusindika.
proposal.form.success: Okusaba kwo kwaweebwa era ne kuterekebwa okusobola okwekenneenyezebwa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Bw'oddamu okuwuliziganya n'ekitongole kya IATF ku kusaba kuno, yogerako n'ebyo ebiri wansi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Waliwo ekikyamu ekyabaddewo ng'oweereza okusaba. Nkusaba ogezeeko nate. Singa ekizibu kikyagenda mu maaso, kozesa email mu kifo ky'ekyo.
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Ensibuko y'Olungereza, enzivuunula ziyinza okwongerwako oluvannyuma
footer.label: Ennyiriri eziri wansi w'omukutu
footer.blurb: Omulimu gw'okutuuka ku bantu aba bulijjo gulina okuba omwangu okutandika, okufulumizibwa, n'okubeerawo.
footer.source: Emitindo gy'okutuuka ku bantu: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Okukola okusinziira ku bakozesa tekinologiya ow'obuyambi.
contact.label: Okuwuliziganya
translation.label: Embeera y'okuvvuunula
translation.source: Olungereza lwe lulimi olutongole olw'olupapula luno.
translation.machineAssisted: Enkyusa eno eyambibwako ebyuma era tebinnaba kwekenneenyezebwa mu bujjuvu omwogezi omumanyifu. Ebirowoozo bikkirizibwa okuyita mu GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Enkyusa eno yakeberebwa nga ensibuko y'Olungereza tennaba kukyusibwa era eyinza okwetaaga okuddaabirizibwa.
